creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Currently "USE_LDCONFIG=yes" is suggested when a shared library is installed.

However, portlint needs to additionally complain when "USE_LDCONFIG=yes" is used with a shared library without the corresponding symbolic link(s).

For example, lib/libxx.so is installed but no lib/libxx.so.0 is installed.

The problem with this is that ldconfig(8) only registers symlinked libraries, and doesn't register single libxx.so libraries.
